raw_consumer_statement:
Company : Citibank / Citigroup Case ID : XXXX Complaint : On XX/XX/XXXX, I was fraudulently induced into authorizing a payment of {$5200.00} to XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX ), a company operating in connection with XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX a debt collector. I was contacted via voicemail using deceptive tactics falsely claiming to represent a XXXX XXXX debt and pressured into paying a debt I did not owe. The alleged debt was sold by XXXX XXXX in XXXX, confirmed in their CFPB response, making it time-barred and uncollectible under the FDCPA. 
I filed a dispute with Citibank under the Fair Credit Billing Act. On XX/XX/XXXX, Citibank denied my claim ( Case ID XXXX ), reversed the provisional credit of {$5200.00}, and stated they could not identify a billing error without addressing the fraudulent inducement. Citibanks investigation failed to account for the deceptive and illegal practices used to obtain my authorization. 
I have filed complaints with the FTC and CFPB against XXXX XXXX XXXX. I am requesting that Citibank reopen this dispute and properly investigate the fraudulent circumstances under which this payment was authorized.
